description_long: This is a rectangular wooden chopping board with a smooth, natural wood grain finish and two metal handles on either short side for easy lifting. The board is topped with a kitchen knife, several slices of cucumber, and a small pile of carrot sticks, suggesting recent food preparation. The wood surface appears well-maintained, with no visible deep knife marks or stains, and the edges are slightly rounded for safety and comfort. The metal handles are cylindrical and extend outward, providing a secure grip. The knife has a dark handle and a shiny blade, positioned diagonally across the board. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for both home and professional kitchen environments.
description: A rectangular wooden chopping board with metal handles, topped with a kitchen knife, cucumber slices, and carrot sticks. The board is clean, smooth, and well-maintained, ideal for food preparation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the board, both metal handles, and the arrangement of the knife, cucumber slices, and carrot sticks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the board, the cylindrical handles, and the food items arranged along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the board, both handles, and the knife placed diagonally with food items clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the board's thickness, handle design, and the alignment of the food and knife.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ob: The chopping board is topped with a kitchen knife, cucumber slices, and carrot sticks, all arranged on its surface.
